texto: I was a man who thrived on solitude
autor: without it I was like another man without food or water. Each day without solitude weakened me. I took no pride in my solitude
explicacao: Citação de without it I was like another man without food or water. Each day without solitude weakened me. I took no pride in my solitude sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I was a man who thrived on solitude” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
